About

Designed to stand out on the shelf. Built to sell on sight.

Every detail — from the reinforced 6-layer glass to the reusable steel case — is crafted to catch the eye, earn trust, and close the sale before your competitors do.

Packaging

Iconic steel packaging

Our signature steel case isn't just packaging — it's a sales tool. Customers pick it up, feel the weight, and instantly recognize premium quality.

Reusable

Sustainable steel case customers keep and repurpose.

Steel

Premium metal finish that demands attention on shelves.

Premium

Luxury positioning that justifies premium price points.
Retail advantage

Benefits for retailers

Eagle Glass was built with one mission: give retailers a screen protector that outsells, outshines, and outperforms everything else on the shelf.

Higher margins with faster turnover

A truly premium product your customers trust

Never out of stock — backed by our deep inventory

Technology

6-layer reinforced glass

Every Eagle Glass protector is engineered with six precision layers that work together to deliver unmatched clarity, strength, and longevity.

  • Instant premium perception on shelf
  • Crystal-clear 99.9% transparency
  • Effortless bubble-free installation
9H

Hardness

0.3 mm

Thickness

99.9 %

Transparency

6

Layers
Product line

Two glass variations

Whether your customers want crystal clarity or total privacy, Eagle Glass delivers — with the same premium quality in every protector.

Premium Glass

Crystal-clear 9H tempered glass with anti-fingerprint coating for flawless daily protection.

Privacy Glass

Advanced privacy filter blocks side-angle viewing while maintaining full clarity head-on.

Whether your customers want crystal clarity or total privacy, Eagle Glass delivers — with the same premium quality in every protector.

FAQ

Questions answered

Everything you need to know about partnering with Eagle Glass.

Eagle Glass features proprietary 6-layer reinforced glass with 9H hardness, anti-fingerprint coating, and shatter-proof technology — all housed in a reusable steel case that creates instant premium appeal on your shelf. Unlike generic protectors, Eagle Glass is engineered to sell itself.
